name: Observable Discrepancy
description: The product behaves differently or sends different responses under different circumstances in a way observable to unauthorized actors, revealing security-relevant information about internal state. This is the root of side-channel attacks including timing attacks on authentication and cryptographic operations.
detection_pattern: Look for CONTROL nodes (authentication checks, cryptographic operations) that produce different EGRESS responses (error messages, timing, HTTP status codes) depending on which condition failed. The absence of a TRANSFORM node (constant-time comparison, uniform error response) between the CONTROL node and EGRESS node means an attacker can distinguish between failure modes.
